items.text: The Riverbank: defeat The Bloated Miller (first boss)
Red Vale / Clearfell: defeat Beira of the Rotten Pack
Clear the Cemetery of the Eternals → Tomb of the Consort
Freythorn: cleanse the altars, defeat The King in the Mist
Ogham Manor: defeat Count Geonor (Act boss)
Hunting Grounds: kill Crowbell → +2 weapon-set skill points
Ogham Farmlands: find Una's Lute, return it to Una → +2 weapon-set skill points
Freythorn: King in the Mist → +30 Spirit (+ guaranteed Uncut Spirit Gem)
Clearfell: Beira of the Rotten Pack → +10% Cold Resistance
Ogham Manor: click Psalm of Madness, defeat Candlemass → +20 Maximum Life
Reaching Clearfell: pick up your first Uncut Skill Gem
Ogham Village: bring Smithing Tools to Renly → unlock the Salvaging Bench
